required_preferences.fact: Preps a quick breakfast solo most mornings and leaves extra breakfast items for her daughter to heat up herself, as her husband is unavailable for morning routines during his project period

supersedes.fact: Preps breakfast for her family every morning before opening the store

required_preferences.fact: Now steps out for lunch at least three times per week — doctor's orders to support dietary changes and proper iron intake; avoids solely desk lunches.

supersedes.fact: Only eats lunch at her desk in the shop, never leaves the store for food midday

required_preferences.fact: Prepares a shared online project tracker and requires all collaborating vendors and designers to update it daily for status alignment during the holiday campaign
Schedules a virtual yoga session once a week with her sister over video call, replacing the social component of their studio classes
Prioritizes attending her daughter's rescheduled school events even when they disrupt previously fixed caregiving and errand routines
Checks her daughter’s homework and bedtime routine every night herself, since her husband is unavailable for evening parenting tasks during the project period

persona: A small business owner with limited legal training handling vendor contracts
